metaDescription: Outsourced accounting manager for US and Canadian companies. A senior manager embedded full-time to run your close, AP, AR, and reconciliations.

hero.lede: An outsourced accounting manager is a senior finance professional who runs the day-to-day finance function, reconciliations, AP, AR, payroll coordination, and month-end close. Satinwood Talent embeds one full-time and exclusively in your business, at the seniority of a local hire, at a fraction of the cost.
hero.credLine: Serving the US and Canada · CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, CIMA qualified

atAGlance.v: A fraction of a local hire

work.title: What an outsourced accounting manager does.
work.lede: An accounting manager runs the engine of your finance function day to day. A Satinwood Talent operator owns the following end to end, inside your own tools.

items.title: Month-end close
items.body: Drives the monthly close on a fixed cadence, with reconciliations done and the books locked on time, every month.

items.title: Accounts payable and receivable
items.body: Owns AP and AR end to end, from coding and approvals to collections and vendor management, so cash flow is never a surprise.

items.title: Bank and account reconciliations
items.body: Reconciles every account monthly so the books tie out to the bank and nothing slips through.

items.title: Payroll coordination
items.body: Coordinates payroll inputs and reconciliations, making sure what gets paid ties to what gets recorded.

items.title: General ledger and journals
items.body: Owns the GL, posting adjusting entries, accruals, and prepayments so the books reflect reality.

items.title: Supporting the controller or CFO
items.body: Handles the production work that frees your controller or CFO to focus on reporting, controls, and strategy.

why.title: A dedicated accounting manager, full-time in your business.

items.title: Always senior
items.body: Accounting manager level and above, qualified and experienced. Not a junior bookkeeper handling volume.

items.title: Dedicated to you
items.body: Full-time and exclusive to your business, embedded in your tools and team. Not a shared task queue spread across ten clients.

items.title: Finance only
items.body: We place finance and nothing else. A finance firm, not a generalist staffing marketplace.

items.title: A fraction of the cost
items.body: The seniority you need for far less, because the talent sits in a lower-cost market, not because the work is junior.

compare.titleEm: at a fraction of the cost.

rows.label: Relative cost
rows.sat: A fraction of a local hire

whoFor.title: Built for growing US and Canadian companies.

items.title: The bookkeeper is not enough
items.body: Transactions are getting complex and you need someone who owns the reconciliations and the close, not just the data entry.

items.title: The controller is buried
items.body: Your controller or CFO is spending too much time on production work and not enough on reporting and strategy.

items.title: The close is always late
items.body: Month-end runs long because nobody owns the process. You need someone dedicated to making it run on time.

items.title: Scaling past manual processes
items.body: The business is growing and the finance function needs a senior operator to hold the standard as it gets more complex.

items.q: What is an outsourced accounting manager?
items.a: An outsourced accounting manager is a senior finance professional who runs the day-to-day finance function from outside your local payroll, owning reconciliations, AP, AR, payroll coordination, the month-end close, and the GL. Satinwood Talent embeds one full-time and exclusively in your business, at the seniority of a local hire and a fraction of the cost.

items.q: What does an outsourced accounting manager do?
items.a: An accounting manager runs the engine of your day-to-day finance function. That means owning the month-end close, AP and AR, bank reconciliations, payroll coordination, general ledger entries, and supporting the controller or CFO on reporting. Satinwood Talent operators run this end to end inside your own tools.

items.q: What is the difference between an accounting manager and a bookkeeper?
items.a: A bookkeeper records transactions; an accounting manager owns the function. A bookkeeper handles data entry. An accounting manager owns the close, the reconciliations, the AP and AR process, the GL integrity, and the production work the controller depends on. Satinwood Talent places accounting manager level talent, not junior bookkeeping.

items.q: What is the difference between an accounting manager and a controller?
items.a: A controller owns financial reporting, controls, and the integrity of the numbers. An accounting manager runs the day-to-day operations, the close, reconciliations, and AP and AR, that make the controller's work possible. Many growing companies need both, and Satinwood Talent places either or both at the same senior standard.

items.q: Can an offshore accounting manager run our month-end close?
items.a: Yes. A senior offshore accounting manager can own your full month-end close, reconciliations, AP and AR, and GL entries, working inside your own tools, with hours that overlap your day so the close never waits.

items.q: How senior are Satinwood Talent's accounting managers?
items.a: Accounting manager level and above, CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, or CIMA qualified, with real ownership experience inside global firms, Big Four, and listed groups. The average senior operator on our bench has 12 or more years of experience.

items.q: Is the accounting manager dedicated and full-time, or shared?
items.a: Dedicated, full-time, and exclusive to your business, embedded in your tools and team. Not a shared pool, not a pooled task queue, not a marketplace match.

items.q: How much does an outsourced accounting manager cost compared with a local hire?
items.a: A fraction of a local accounting manager, who in the US or Canada typically costs well into six figures with benefits and payroll taxes. You get the same seniority and day-to-day ownership for far less, because the talent sits in a lower-cost market, not because the work is junior.

items.q: Do you work with US and Canadian companies?
items.a: Yes. Satinwood Talent serves growing companies across the United States and Canada, as well as the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and Australia. Operators work hours that overlap your day, agreed up front.

items.q: How fast can you place an accounting manager, and is there a trial?
items.a: About two weeks from the first call to a hand-selected senior match. Every match starts on a trial to confirm fit, and if it is not right we replace it. Terms are flexible and rolling, with no long lock-in.

items.q: How is our financial data handled?
items.a: Secure, company-issued devices, signed NDAs, role-based access, and documented handling standards. Your financial data is treated as if our own books depended on it.

cta.title: Get a senior accounting manager, embedded.

ledeParts.text: Tell us about your close and your stack. We hand-select a senior accounting manager and embed them full-time, usually within about two weeks. We also place
